name: Giant Vulture

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The wasp doesn’t provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

text:
# Giant Vulture

*Medium Beast, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Sting.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.
